item.title: Classic 1954 Buick Special 2-Door #cars
item.description: A look at the classic 1954 Buick Special 2-Door, with its distinctive styling and vintage appeal. A simple showcase of a notable postwar Buick. What details stand out to you?

media:content.media:title: Classic 1954 Buick Special 2-Door #cars
media:content.media:description: A look at the classic 1954 Buick Special 2-Door, with its distinctive styling and vintage appeal. A simple showcase of a notable postwar Buick. What details stand out to you?

item.title: 1966 Chevrolet Corvair Stinger Yenko #76 of 100
item.description: A look at the 1966 Chevrolet Corvair Stinger Yenko, number 76 of 100. This video highlights the car’s place in the Corvair story and its distinctive Stinger details. What stands out most to you?

media:content.media:title: 1966 Chevrolet Corvair Stinger Yenko #76 of 100
media:content.media:description: A look at the 1966 Chevrolet Corvair Stinger Yenko, number 76 of 100. This video highlights the car’s place in the Corvair story and its distinctive Stinger details. What stands out most to you?

item.title: A Rumble Seat on This 1930 Cadillac
item.description: A look at a 1930 Cadillac featuring a rumble seat, with a focus on its classic design and period details. What stands out most about this vintage Cadillac?

media:content.media:title: A Rumble Seat on This 1930 Cadillac
media:content.media:description: A look at a 1930 Cadillac featuring a rumble seat, with a focus on its classic design and period details. What stands out most about this vintage Cadillac?

item.title: 1969 Dodge Charger with Hand-Painted Dukes Motor
item.description: A 1969 Dodge Charger featuring an amazing hand-painted Dukes of Hazzard motor is highlighted in this showcase. The video focuses on the car’s look and unique details. What stands out most to you?

media:content.media:title: 1969 Dodge Charger with Hand-Painted Dukes Motor
media:content.media:description: A 1969 Dodge Charger featuring an amazing hand-painted Dukes of Hazzard motor is highlighted in this showcase. The video focuses on the car’s look and unique details. What stands out most to you?
